Beer on tap.name: JazzBerry Blonde Ale
Beer on tap.description: Light Blonde Ale full of raspberry color, aroma and flavor with a tart finish | Price: $8.00

Beer on tap.name: Jagged Little Dill Gose
Beer on tap.description: Light, tart ale, brewed with dill, coriander, salt, mustard seed and peppercorn to replicate pickle brine. Best enjoyed outside in the sun! | Price: $8.00

Beer on tap.name: Climb West Coast IPA
Beer on tap.description: Originally brewed as our 3rd Anniversary Beer in 2022. This 2026 batch is brewed and dry hopped in the west coast style with Centennial, Cascade & Cashmere. Crisp, clear with an upfront lemon/pine flavor and a clean, bitter finish. | Price: $8.00

Beer on tap.name: Apple Blossom Trail Hard Cider
Beer on tap.description: Made from locally grown apples from Jaswell's farm in Smithfield, RI, this cider is off dry, with a crisp, refreshing, apple finish. | Price: $8.00

Beer on tap.name: Station 3 Pilsner
Beer on tap.description: Crisp Czech Pilsner brewed with 100% Stonepath Pilsner malt and Saaz hops. Brewed in tribute to Woonsocket's Station 3 fire station, our neighbor on North Main Street. | Price: $7.50

Beer on tap.name: Flock Together Pale Ale
Beer on tap.description: This pale ale was dry hopped with Callista hops for a unique honey, berry, and passion fruit aroma. A portion of the proceeds from this beer will be going to local LGBTQ+ organization @hausofcodec, who work to create a safer and more accessible means to housing, care, and essential services for displaced youth ages 18-24. | Price: $7.75

Beer on tap.name: Star Hazing NEIPA
Beer on tap.description: Hazy New England IPA, generously dry hopped with Citra and Galaxy hops | Price: $8.00
